title: ORT project
description: The OSS-Review-Toolkit (ORT) project package manager uses definition files to manually define projects and their dependencies. A full list of all available options can be found at https://oss-review-toolkit.org/ort/docs/guides/ort-project-package-manager.

description.description: A brief description of the project.

homepageUrl.description: The URL of the project homepage.

declaredLicenses.description: List of declared licenses for the project in SPDX format.

authors.description: List of authors of the project.

dependencies.description: List of dependency packages for the project.

purl.description: The package URL in PURL format. Must start with 'pkg:'. Qualifier and subpath components are not supported.

id.description: The package identifier in ORT format: '<package-manager>/<namespace>/<name>/<version>'.

description.description: A brief description of the package.

declaredLicenses.description: List of declared licenses for the dependency in SPDX format.

homepageUrl.description: The URL of the package homepage.

labels.description: User-defined labels associated with this package as key-value pairs.

authors.description: List of authors of the dependency.

scopes.description: List of scopes the package belongs to.

isModified.description: Flag indicating whether the source code of the package has been modified compared to the original source code. Default is false.

isMetadataOnly.description: Flag indicating whether the package is just metadata, like Maven BOM artifacts which only define constraints for dependency versions. Default is false.

vcs.description: The version control system location of the package.

revision.description: The VCS revision (branch, tag, or commit).

path.description: The VCS path within the repository. Default is empty string.

sourceArtifact.description: The remote artifact where the source package can be downloaded.

url.description: The URL to the source artifact.
